title: Design System: Ehsanul Haque Siam Portfolio

signal-success.meaning: live/published/available/positive; unifies the old green-500-vs-emerald drift

accent-emphasis.meaning: THE one earned non-status accent; proof-metric numerals only (About/WhyMe/CaseStudies)

ascii-surface.meaning: theme-flipping plate behind AsciiField/AsciiTorus; dark value ~= old #05060a

display.purpose: Hero H1 name only; largest scale on the page.

script.purpose: Pacifico signature; first name + one hero word. Max two per viewport.

title.purpose: Centered icon + ScrambleText section headings; deliberately modest.

label.purpose: Keycaps, metadata, skip link. Geist Mono. Reads as data.

shadows.name: card-hover-lift
shadows.purpose: The only ambient shadow — appears on .glass-card:hover, paired with a border lift.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Background halo + ring so focus reads on any surface.

motion.name: ease-out-strong
motion.purpose: Default exponential ease-out for reveals, underlines, and state transitions.

motion.name: ease-float
motion.purpose: Slow ambient loops (studio cat tail sway).

motion.name: theme-crossfade
motion.purpose: Light/dark toggle cross-fade; disabled under reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Highest-contrast, lowest-color affordance: foreground fill, background text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; background: var(--foreground, #f8fafc); color: var(--background, #030712); border: none; transition: background 160ms ease, transform 140ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--foreground, #f8fafc) 88%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Glass Button
components.description: Default secondary action: translucent card fill, hairline border, blur.
components.css: .ds-btn-glass { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--foreground, #f8fafc); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--card, #181d29) 60%, transparent); border: 1px solid var(--border, #1e2531); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); transition: background 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease, transform 140ms ease; } .ds-btn-glass:hover { border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ring, #6b7280) 70%, transparent); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary, #1e2531) 80%, transparent); } .ds-btn-glass:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Flat-at-rest surface; shadow and border lift only on hover.
components.css: .ds-glass-card { border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 1rem; color: var(--foreground, #f8fafc); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--card, #181d29) 55%, transparent); border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--border, #1e2531) 80%, transparent); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); transition: border-color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease, background-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-glass-card:hover { border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ring, #6b7280) 60%, transparent); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px -12px rgba(248,250,252,0.18); } .ds-glass-card h3 { font-weight: 700; } .ds-glass-card p { color: var(--muted-fg, #9099a8); }

components.name: Section Heading
components.description: Centered icon + title; the string decodes via ScrambleText on scroll-in. Deliberately modest.
components.html: Projects
components.css: .ds-section-heading { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 2rem; color: var(--secondary-fg, #f8fafc); } .ds-section-heading svg { width: 1.5rem; height: 1.5rem; margin-right: 0.5rem; } .ds-section-heading h2 { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: A semantic status dot + label; the dot uses a --signal-* token (here pending/after-hours). Status is one of the two sanctioned on-surface color kinds.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--muted-fg, #9099a8); } .ds-status-dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: hsl(var(--signal-pending, 43 96% 56%)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px hsl(var(--signal-pending, 43 96% 56%) / 0.18); }

components.name: Mono Keycap
components.description: Geist Mono keycap for the ⌘K command-palette hint; reads as machine data.
components.css: .ds-kbd { display: inline-block; border-radius: 0.375rem; border: 1px solid var(--border, #1e2531); background: var(--secondary, #1e2531); padding: 0.125rem 0.375rem; font-family: 'Geist Mono Variable', 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--secondary-fg, #f8fafc); transition: transform 200ms ease; } .ds-kbd:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); }

components.name: Earned Accent Metric
components.description: A count-up proof metric: iris-violet numeral (the one earned accent), muted label. About/WhyMe/CaseStudies only. The number is the emphasis; the accent never touches the label.
components.css: .ds-metric { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; } .ds-metric-num { font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.05em; color: hsl(var(--accent-emphasis, 252 90% 78%)); } .ds-metric-label { margin-top: 0.25rem; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: hsl(var(--muted-fg, 218 11% 65%)); }

components.name: Rainbow Contact CTA
components.description: The single sanctioned full-color moment — footer contact CTA only. Never reuse.
components.css: .ds-rainbow { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.6rem 1.75rem; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; color: #030712; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(95% 0.13 95), oklch(87% 0.26 315), oklch(72% 0.24 280), oklch(88% 0.14 215), oklch(83% 0.15 210)); background-size: 200%; animation: ds-rainbow-move 2s infinite linear; } @keyframes ds-rainbow-move { 0% { background-position: 0%; } 100% { background-position: 200%; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-rainbow { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview: This is the desk of an engineer who ships at night: the room is dark, the light is a screen, and everything on the surface is either information or a tool. The system is monochrome by conviction — a neutral slate grayscale carries every heading, paragraph, border, and surface; the near-black #030712 background is the default, and light mode is a first-class alternate. Depth comes from tonal layering, never heavy shadow. Color is rationed like a scarce resource: a unified theme-aware signal set (--signal-success/pending/problem/star) marks real status, ONE earned iris-violet accent (--accent-emphasis) lights only the count-up proof-metric numerals, and two sealed decorative moments remain — the single rainbow contact button and the theme-aware ASCII particle fields (--ascii-surface). The polish is the pitch; for a technical-hire audience, fast, quiet, and exact is more persuasive than loud.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome slate grayscale; default dark, light mode as a peer.
Color = unified semantic signal tokens + ONE earned accent (metrics) + two sealed decorative exceptions.
Depth by tonal layering, not shadow.
Geist (sans + mono) with Pacifico as a single script accent.
Motion is choreographed but gated: reduced-motion + offscreen pauses everywhere.

rules.name: The Signal-Plus-One Rule
rules.body: Color on the base surface must carry meaning: either a --signal-* status token (success/pending/problem/star) or the ONE earned --accent-emphasis on proof-metric numerals. Everything else is grayscale. No color for 'warmth', no third accent, no accent on labels/headings/body.

rules.name: The Earned-Accent Rarity Rule
rules.body: The iris-violet accent appears on exactly three surfaces (About/WhyMe/CaseStudies metric numerals) and nowhere else. All-or-nothing across those three; never a fourth place. Rarity is what makes it read as earned.

rules.name: The Two Exceptions Rule
rules.body: Exactly two full-color DECORATIVE moments are sanctioned: the single footer RainbowButton and the theme-aware AsciiField/AsciiTorus particle scenes. The GlowCard hover glow reuses the ASCII's sealed violet-to-cyan palette (not a third exception). Effects, not palette. Do not multiply them.

rules.name: The One Flourish Rule
rules.body: Pacifico appears at most twice per viewport and never in body copy or a section heading. It is a signature, not a typeface for the page.

rules.name: The Quiet Heading Rule
rules.body: Section headings stay at text-xl/text-2xl. Display scale is reserved for the hero. No section competes with the name.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat by default. Elevation is a response to state (hover, focus), never a resting decoration.

rules.name: The Tonal-Depth Rule
rules.body: To lift a surface, step its lightness toward the card token — do not reach for a shadow. In dark mode, higher = lighter, same hue and chroma.

dos: Do keep the base surface grayscale. Reach for foreground / muted-foreground / border before any hue.

Do use the --signal-* tokens (text-signal-success, bg-signal-pending/15, ...) for status — never raw amber-500/emerald-500/green-500/rose-500 literals. One hue, one meaning, theme-aware, WCAG-checked.
Do apply --accent-emphasis (iris-violet) only to count-up proof-metric numerals, on all three metric surfaces (About/WhyMe/CaseStudies) or none — never a subset.
Do convey depth by stepping the surface lightness toward the card token; add shadow only as a hover/focus response.
Do keep muted-foreground above 4.5:1 on its surface — light-gray-for-elegance is the single biggest reason a design reads as hard to use.
Do gate every animation behind prefers-reduced-motion and pause every canvas/rAF loop offscreen and on document.hidden (Lighthouse mobile ≥94 is a hard floor).
Do reserve Pacifico for at most two flourishes per viewport; reserve display scale for the hero name.
donts: Don't let any hue OWN the surface. The one iris-violet accent is a scalpel on proof numerals, not a brand color — it never touches backgrounds, headings, body, or nav. Restrained-monochrome-plus-one-accent, not 'Committed-dark with violet'.
Don't ship the dark-mode-with-purple-gradients SaaS template, neon accents, or glassmorphism as decoration — glass is chrome-only and purposeful.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe borders (border-left/right > 1px as an accent), or an all-caps tracked eyebrow above every section. Emphasis is weight and size.
Don't multiply the color exceptions. Exactly one RainbowButton (footer CTA) and the ASCII fields; nothing else earns full spectrum.
Don't let a section heading compete with the hero — headings stay text-xl/text-2xl.
Don't gate content visibility on a reveal transition; reveals must enhance already-visible, crawlable HTML (SSR/SEO invariant).
